item.title: I’m so incredibly sick of the implicit lesser of two evils argument in all of this content that solely looks at what the current...
item.description:
I’m so incredibly sick of the implicit lesser of two evils argument in all of this content that solely looks at what the current administration is doing without offering a system to prevent the harms of previous administration. It’s disrespectful to the victims of those administration and disrespectful to the victims right now.



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: Sometimes you just need to listen to the right wing of a country for them to finally tell you the truth and well beyond denying ...
item.description:
Sometimes you just need to listen to the right wing of a country for them to finally tell you the truth and well beyond denying their crime crimes they will justify and emphatically support | ON WHERE them#greenscreenvide

item.title: #greenscreenvideo I’m not DSA btw but it is evident they represent a tendency within the left and a real organisational push wit...
item.description:
#greenscreenvideo I’m not DSA btw but it is evident they represent a tendency within the left and a real organisational push within it in a way the libs don’t

item.title: Liberals were often recognise some form of an issue but gaslight you into believing the solution isn’t the obvious problem and t...
item.description:
Liberals were often recognise some form of an issue but gaslight you into believing the solution isn’t the obvious problem and the obvious answer but some esoteric right wing nonsense. #greenscreenvideo



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: I don’t know how a human looks at this and fails to see what is so depraved and racist about this
item.description:
I don’t know how a human looks at this and fails to see what is so depraved and racist about this. I understand that we need to work within the country and system we have and I endeavour to do so, but every time I see stuff like this I almost vomit#greenscreenvideo



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)
